description_long: This is a large, ornate house with a distinctly Victorian architectural style, featuring a steeply pitched, multi-gabled roof with intricate dormers and a prominent central tower. The exterior is clad in green horizontal siding with white trim, and the roof is dark, weathered, and partially covered in what appears to be snow or lichen. The front facade includes a covered porch with decorative railings and columns, as well as a bay window and a tall brick chimney. Multiple windows of varying sizes and arrangements are distributed across all sides, including a set of three windows in the tower and a prominent bay window on the front. The house sits elevated with a small set of steps leading to the main entryway, which is sheltered by the porch. Overall, the structure exudes a historic, stately presence typical of late 19th-century residential buildings.
description: A large, green Victorian house with a steep, multi-gabled roof, ornate trim, a central tower, and a covered front porch with decorative columns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, bay window, and tall central tower with ornate trim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the multi-gabled roof, and the extended porch area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a simpler facade with fewer windows and a small back step.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the tall brick chimney and the side gable roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay windows and grouped tower windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with decorative columns, white railings, and a small set of steps leading to a central door
